question: Which of the following resources is NOT listed in the Camunda 8.8 docs under the 'Learning FEEL' section?

options.text: A page titled `Type system reference` covering every FEEL data type in depth.
A page covering FEEL syntax and operators, used to learn how to write basic expressions.
A page describing the built-in functions the FEEL engine offers.
A page on Expressions in Camunda 8, explaining how expressions are used within the platform.

a.text: The Learning FEEL section does not list a dedicated `Type system reference` page. The three linked resources are Expressions in Camunda 8, FEEL syntax and operators, and Built-in functions.

b.text: The Learning FEEL section does list a resource on FEEL syntax and operators for writing basic expressions, so this option describes a real entry.

c.text: The Learning FEEL section does list a resource on built-in functions offered by the FEEL engine, so this option describes a real entry.

d.text: The Learning FEEL section does link Expressions in Camunda 8, explaining how expressions are used within the platform, so this option describes a real entry.

explanation: The Learning FEEL section of the FEEL overview page links exactly three follow-on resources: Expressions in Camunda 8, FEEL syntax and operators, and Built-in functions. There is no dedicated `Type system reference` listed there.
